title: 10 Essential Oils for Baldness in Men
description: Serenoa repens essential oils, also known as saw palmetto oil, is a natural remedy that may help with baldness. It contains properties like fatty acids, terpenes, and phytosterols, which are known to block the conversion of testosterone to dihydrotestosterone (DHT), a hormone that can contribute to hair loss. The constituents of saw palmetto oil include beta-sitosterol, uvaol, and ferulic acid, which have been shown to inhibit DHT production and promote hair growth. If you're consideri...
